feature: Fix dark mode in meal-plan-config.tsx and daily-view.tsx — replace hardcoded colors with semantic classes

prompts.prompt:
In components/meal-plan-config.tsx, replace ALL hardcoded color values with semantic Tailwind classes. Apply these exact changes:

1. Hero badge (around line 95):
   Change: `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `hero-badge bg-secondary text-muted-foreground`

2. Daily Target card container (around line 106):
   Change: `border border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea]`
   To:     `border border-border bg-secondary/60`

3. "Daily target" label text (around line 109):
   Change: `text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `text-muted-foreground`

4. Accent dot (around line 152):
   Change: `bg-[#b77749]`
   To:     `bg-muted-foreground`

5. Selected meal count card active state (around line 173):
   Change: `bg-[#edf4ec]`
   To:     `bg-primary/15`

6. Meal count card hover state (around line 174):
   Change: `hover:bg-[#fcf7ef]`
   To:     `hover:bg-secondary`

Do not change any other classes, props, or files. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

prompts.description: Fix hero badges, loading screen, and error screen in daily-view.tsx
prompts.prompt:
In components/daily-view.tsx, replace hardcoded colors in the loading screen, error screen, and all hero badge instances. Apply these exact changes:

1. All hero-badge instances (lines ~264, ~307, ~461, ~784, ~993) — there are 5 total:
   Change: `hero-badge ... bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `hero-badge ... bg-secondary text-muted-foreground`
   (Preserve any other classes like `mx-auto` that appear alongside the badge.)

2. Error screen status icon container (around line 308):
   Change: `bridge-status-icon mt-4 border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] text-[#b77749]`
   To:     `bridge-status-icon mt-4 border-border bg-secondary/60 text-muted-foreground`

Do not change any other classes, props, or files. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

prompts.description: Fix accent dots, day chips, and meal label pills in daily-view.tsx
prompts.prompt:
In components/daily-view.tsx, replace hardcoded colors in accent dots, the selected day chip, and the meal label pill. Apply these exact changes:

1. All accent dot spans (lines ~532, ~619, ~751, ~796, ~842, ~874, ~932) — there are 7 instances of `bg-[#b77749]` used as decorative dots:
   Change: `bg-[#b77749]`
   To:     `bg-muted-foreground`

2. Selected day chip active state (around line 496):
   Change: `bg-[#edf4ec]`
   To:     `bg-primary/15`

3. Meal label pill inside each meal card (around line 654):
   Change: `dashboard-meta-pill bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `dashboard-meta-pill bg-secondary text-muted-foreground`

Do not change any other classes, props, or files. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
